callGraph.callee:
[...ctxSet].sort((a, b) => a - b)
                .slice(0, 40) // 폭주 방지 상한
                .map

[
                prevIdx >= 0 ? pSec : null,
                nextIdx >= 0 ? nSec : null,
            ].filter

[
        ...items.map(i => ({ index: i.index, text: i.text, target: true })),
        ...(contextItems || []).filter(c => !targetSet.has(c.index)).map(c => ({ index: c.index, text: c.text, target: false })),
    ].sort
